name: The Salt-Wives [Of Flesh and Fin]
description:
[COMMISSION]

Adrift and alone at sea on a raft, you are found by a pod of monstrously beautiful shark sirens. They are not here to rescue you. They are here to claim you.

[Art Credit: hattonslayden]

[PRO TIP: Mention "The Merry Drowners" for MORE fish ladies.]
